purpose: Define how the system moves from this chat into a governed agent connected to the CASULO runtime.

modes.description: User uploads/supplies context; assistant follows CASULO protocol and repo outputs.
A Custom GPT calls CASULO runtime endpoints as Actions.
Agent service calls runtime, state store, graph store and evidence store.
Separate agents for intake, graph, evaluation, development and audit.
Auth, database, graph DB, RAG, audit log, UI and controlled integrations.

operating_flow: company/user sends sanitized context in chat
agent generates answer/report/task/code only within allowed scope
agent records audit and calibration note
